extra.reason: Audited all 24 .md files. Content clean: 0 Vue interpolation, all code fences Shiki-valid (php/js/json), 0 risky raw tags in wiki pages. Only real fixes: doctoc strip (13 pages), relative image paths, +2 stray prose tags in fetched CHANGELOG (<a>,<button>). Junk dropped: Basic-Usages, Create-New-Posts-Form, _Footer. Plan mis-flagged Bringing-Metaboxes (NOT empty).

VitePress scaffolded; dev + build both green. URL parity verified (/, /changelog, /contributing, 20x /docs/*). srcExclude meta, cleanUrls, GA4 + Search Console verification, brand #5d67ff, GitHub-star button, Gitter dropped. 6 granular commits on branch vitepress-migration.

RESOLVED: reuse the existing CMB2/Wiki repo (public, already 'Used for https://cmb2.io', homepage cmb2.io) as the canonical VitePress source — no new repo. This clone is already a clone of it (gh remote). Migration work pushed to branch vitepress-migration; master stays untouched (legacy Flatdoc reads CMB2/Wiki@master at runtime) until cutover.

Non-issue. Live at cmb2-io.jtsternberg.workers.dev the page resolves: /docs/Plugin-code-to-add-JS-validation-of-%22required%22-fields → 200. Raw-quote form 307-redirects to the %22/%26-encoded form then 200. No rename needed.
Drop confirmed by JT. The three stray files (Basic-Usages 'ac', Create-New-Posts-Form 'hello', _Footer) stay dropped; recoverable from git history if ever needed.

Fixed. 28 dead in-page anchors (underscore-vs-hyphen slug mismatch in Field-Types/Field-Parameters/Box-Properties TOCs) rewritten via a slugify transform in migrate.js. Re-verified against built HTML: 0 dead in-page anchors site-wide.

Done for the ambiguous/longest headings (Installation 4, REST-API 2, Tips 2, show_on 1) — shortened concise + article-free per JT, each with a back-compat <a name=old-slug> so old links survive. 0 dead anchors after. Merely-long-but-unique headings (40-70 chars) left as-is per JT ('tell me if you want the rest').
Skipped per JT — going straight to cmb2.io cutover instead of a staging subdomain. QA done on cmb2-io.jtsternberg.workers.dev.

Phase 2 done: content migrated/transformed, titles derived, doctoc stripped, image paths fixed, cross-page wiki links rewritten to /docs, in-page + cross-page anchors slugified (0 dead), verbose TOC headings shortened with back-compat anchors, visual QA passed. Build hygiene fixed (no CLAUDE/AGENTS leaks). Optional CI refresh (.3.3) deferred.
